summaryForNext: 4 OpenSpec changes (23 tasks) in dependency order: add-admin-authn (G1,5) -> add-token-exchange (G2,6) -> add-client-creds-introspection (G3,6) -> add-nhi-cedar-principals (G4,6). ZeeSpec gate inactive (opt-in, no .zeespec). Operator decisions baked in: G2 gateway-local-first with delegate_to_hydra seam (off); G4 distinct Cedar Agent::/Service:: types; G1 none-on-loopback / refuse-off-loopback-without-auth. Backend openspec, driver kbd-apply. Every change has a fail-closed `degrades_to_deny` test task. Plan: confirm this order + surface remaining open questions (opaque-token store, Redis-L2 carry-over).
